---
title: "Frameworks Multi-Agents"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Frameworks Multi-Agents

## LangGraph (LangChain)

| Caract├Еristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 10K+ |
| Paradigme | Directed graphs (state machine) |

**Features** : Stateful agents, cycles, human-in-the-loop, streaming, checkpointing, sub-graphs, parallel execution.

```python
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, END

graph = StateGraph(AgentState)
graph.add_node("planner", plan_step)
graph.add_node("executor", execute_step)
graph.add_node("reviewer", review_step)

graph.add_edge("planner", "executor")
graph.add_conditional_edges("executor", should_review, {
    True: "reviewer", False: END
})
graph.add_conditional_edges("reviewer", is_good, {
    True: END, False: "planner"
})
```

## CrewAI

| Caract├Еristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 25K+ |
| Paradigme | Role-based crews |

**Features** : Role-based agents (researcher, writer, reviewer), tasks, processes (sequential, hierarchical), tools, memory.

```python
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

researcher = Agent(
    role="Researcher",
    goal="Find information",
    backstory="Expert researcher",
    tools=[search_tool]
)

writer = Agent(
    role="Writer",
    goal="Write a report",
    backstory="Technical writer"
)

crew = Crew(
    agents=[researcher, writer],
    tasks=[research_task, write_task],
    process=Process.sequential
)
```

## AutoGen (Microsoft)

| Caract├Еristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/microsoft/autogen` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 35K+ |
| Paradigme | Conversational multi-agent |

**Features** : Conversational agents, GroupChat, code execution, human proxy, nested chats.

## OpenAI Swarm

| Caract├Еristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/openai/swarm` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Paradigme | Lightweight handoff |

**Features** : Ultra-l├Еger, routing via handoffs, pas de state management, educational framework.

## Comparatif

| Framework | Paradigme | Stateful | Streaming | Human-in-loop | Complexit├Е | Production |
|-----------|-----------|----------|-----------|---------------|------------|------------|
| LangGraph | Graph | РюЁ | РюЁ | РюЁ | Moyenne | РюЁ |
| CrewAI | Roles | РюЁ | Рџа№ИЈ | РюЁ | Faible | РюЁ |
| AutoGen | Conversation | РюЁ | РюЁ | РюЁ | Moyenne | РюЁ |
| Swarm | Handoff | РЮї | РЮї | РЮї | Tr├еs faible | РЮї (educational) |

::: callout-tip
## Choix framework
- **LangGraph** Рђћ Best pour workflows complexes avec cycles et conditions
- **CrewAI** Рђћ Best pour teams d'agents avec r├┤les d├Еfinis (simple, rapide)
- **AutoGen** Рђћ Best pour conversations multi-agent avec code execution
- **Swarm** Рђћ Best pour apprendre les concepts (pas production)
:::

## Frameworks d├Еcouverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_START -->
### [hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)
The agent that grows with you

РГљ 213.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `clawdbot`

### [AgentGuide](https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide)
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agentт╝ђтЈЉТїЄтЇЌ | LangGraphт«ъТѕў | жФўу║ДRAG | УйгУАїтцДТеАтъІ | тцДТеАтъІжЮбУ»Ћ | у«ЌТ│ЋтиЦуеІтИѕ | жЮбУ»Ћжбўт║Њ | т╝║тїќтГдС╣а№йюТЋ░ТЇ«тљѕТѕљ

РГљ 6.9k | `HTML` | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agenticrag`, `ai-agent`, `crewai`, `graphrag`, `grpo`, `interview`, `job-hunting`, `langchain`

### [fim-one](https://github.com/fim-ai/fim-one)
Open-source agent platform for Global ├Ќ China enterprises Рђћ wire every system through one agent core. Self-hosted, any LLM.

РГљ 1.3k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `connector`, `dag`, `fastapi`, `function-calling`, `llm`

### [cashclaw](https://github.com/moltlaunch/cashclaw)
An autonomous agent that takes work, does work, gets paid, and gets better at it.

РГљ 1.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agent`, `autonomous-agent`, `base`, `claude`, `llm`, `marketplace`, `onchain`, `self-learning`

### [agentos](https://github.com/framerslab/agentos)
TypeScript AI agent framework: cognitive memory, runtime tool forging, multi-agent orchestration, 11 LLM providers.

РГљ 591 | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent-framework`, `agent-memory`, `agentic-ai`, `ai-agent-framework`, `ai-agents`, `autonomous-agents`, `cognitive-memory`, `emergent-behavior`

### [AgentGPT](https://github.com/reworkd/AgentGPT)
AI Agents with Langchain & OpenAI (Vercel / Nextjs) !GitHub Repo stars


### [autonomous-hr-chatbot](https://github.com/stepanogil/autonomous-hr-chatbot)
An autonomous agent that can answer HR related queries autonomously using the tools it has on hand !GitHub Repo stars


### [crewai](https://github.com/joaomdmoura/crewai)
Cutting-edge framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. !GitHub Repo stars


### [data-to-paper](https://github.com/Technion-Kishony-lab/data-to-paper)
data-to-paper: AI-driven research from data to human-verifiable research papers !GitHub Repo stars


### [DemoGPT](https://github.com/melih-unsal/DemoGPT)
DemoGPT enables you to create quick demos by just using prompt. It applies ToT approach on Langchain documentation tree. !GitHub Repo stars


### [devika](https://github.com/stitionai/devika)
Devika is an Agentic AI Software Engineer that can understand high-level human instructions, break them down into steps, research relevant information, and write code to achieve the given objective...


### [gpt-pilot](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot)
GPT Pilot is the core technology for the Pythagora VS Code extension that aims to provide the first real AI developer companion. !GitHub Repo stars


### [llm_agents](https://github.com/mpaepper/llm_agents)
Build agents which are controlled by LLMs !GitHub Repo stars


### [localGPT](https://github.com/PromtEngineer/localGPT)
Inspired on Private GPT with the GPT4ALL model replaced with the Vicuna-7B model and using the InstructorEmbeddings instead of LlamaEmbeddings !GitHub Repo stars


### [MetaGPT](https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT)
The Multi-Agent Meta Programming Framework: Given one line Requirement, return PRD, Design, Tasks, Repo and CI !GitHub Repo stars


### [OpenAgents](https://github.com/xlang-ai/OpenAgents)
An Open Platform for Language Agents in the Wild !GitHub Repo stars


### [OpenAGI](https://github.com/agiresearch/OpenAGI)
When LLM Meets Domain Experts.


### [privateGPT](https://github.com/imartinez/privateGPT)
Interact privately with your documents using the power of GPT, 100% privately, no data leaks !GitHub Repo stars


### [superagent](https://github.com/homanp/superagent)
Deploy LLM Agents to production !GitHub Repo stars


### [SWE-agent](https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent)
SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using GPT-4, or your LM of choice. !GitHub Repo stars


### [Voyager](https://github.com/MineDojo/Voyager)
An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models !GitHub Repo stars


### [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/OpenBMB/XAgent)
An Autonomous LLM Agent for Complex Task Solving !GitHub Repo stars


### [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)
Open-source AI agent framework that turns LLMs into persistent, proactive personal AI agents with multi-channel messaging (Signal, Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp), cron scheduling, memory systems, MCP...


### [llama-agentic-system](https://github.com/meta-llama/llama-agentic-system)
Agentic components of the Llama Stack APIs !GitHub Repo stars


### [LlamaIndex](https://github.com/jerryjliu/llama_index)
provides a central interface to connect your LLM's with external data. !GitHub Repo stars


### [LangChain](https://github.com/hwchase17/langchain)
the original ­ЪљЇ !GitHub Repo stars


### [Botpress](https://github.com/botpress/botpress)
The building blocks for building chatbots !GitHub Repo stars


### [Haystack](https://github.com/deepset-ai/haystack)
NLP framework to interact with your data using Transformer models and LLMs !GitHub Repo stars


### [Semantic Kernel](https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel)
Microsoft C# SDK to integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps !GitHub Repo stars


### [Agent-LLM](https://github.com/Josh-XT/Agent-LLM)
An Artificial Intelligence Automation Platform. !GitHub Repo stars


<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_END -->
